6:
WITH cust_cons AS (
  SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
    AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
  GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
seg_min AS (
  SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
  FROM cust_cons
  GROUP BY Segment
),
seg_avg AS (
  SELECT cc.Segment,
         SUM(cc.total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS avg_consumption
  FROM cust_cons cc
  JOIN seg_min sm ON cc.Segment = sm.Segment AND cc.total_consumption = sm.min_consumption
  GROUP BY cc.Segment
)
SELECT
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT c.Segment, ym.Date, ym.Consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
),
agg AS (
    SELECT Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013
    FROM filtered
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT Segment,
        CASE WHEN cons_2013 = 0 THEN NULL
             ELSE ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0) / cons_2013
        END AS pct_increase
    FROM agg
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM pct)
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM pct);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT CASE WHEN last_sec = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((last_sec - champ_sec) / last_sec) * 100 END AS percent_faster
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN instr(c.time, ':') > 0 THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN instr(substr(c.time, instr(c.time, ':')+1), ':') > 0 THEN
                        (CAST(substr(c.time, 1, instr(c.time, ':')-1) AS REAL)*3600) +
                        (CAST(substr(substr(c.time, instr(c.time, ':')+1), 1, instr(substr(c.time, instr(c.time, ':')+1), ':')-1) AS REAL)*60) +
                        CAST(substr(substr(c.time, instr(c.time, ':')+1), instr(substr(c.time, instr(c.time, ':')+1), ':')+1) AS REAL)
                    ELSE
                        (CAST(substr(c.time, 1, instr(c.time, ':')-1) AS REAL)*60) +
                        CAST(substr(c.time, instr(c.time, ':')+1) AS REAL)
                END
            ELSE
                CAST(c.time AS REAL)
        END AS champ_sec,
        CASE 
            WHEN instr(l.time, ':') > 0 THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN instr(substr(l.time, instr(l.time, ':')+1), ':') > 0 THEN
                        (CAST(substr(l.time, 1, instr(l.time, ':')-1) AS REAL)*3600) +
                        (CAST(substr(substr(l.time, instr(l.time, ':')+1), 1, instr(substr(l.time, instr(l.time, ':')+1), ':')-1) AS REAL)*60) +
                        CAST(substr(substr(l.time, instr(l.time, ':')+1), instr(substr(l.time, instr(l.time, ':')+1), ':')+1) AS REAL)
                    ELSE
                        (CAST(substr(l.time, 1, instr(l.time, ':')-1) AS REAL)*60) +
                        CAST(substr(l.time, instr(l.time, ':')+1) AS REAL)
                END
            ELSE
                CAST(l.time AS REAL)
        END AS last_sec
    FROM (
        SELECT r.time FROM results r
        JOIN races ON r.raceId = races.raceId
        WHERE races.year = 2008 AND races.name LIKE '%Australian Grand Prix%' AND r.position = 1 AND r.time IS NOT NULL
        LIMIT 1
    ) c,
    (
        SELECT r.time FROM results r
        JOIN races ON r.raceId = races.raceId
        WHERE races.year = 2008 AND races.name LIKE '%Australian Grand Prix%' AND r.time IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY r.position DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) l
);	----- bird -----	formula_1

  SELECT c.client_id
  FROM client c
  JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id

  JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
  GROUP BY c.client_id
  HAVING MIN(l.date) = '1993-07-05'
),
client_account AS (
  SELECT d.account_id
  FROM disp d
  JOIN first_loan_client f ON d.client_id = f.client_id
  LIMIT 1
),
balances AS (
  SELECT 
    (SELECT balance FROM trans WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM client_account) AND date = '1993-03-22') AS bal_early,
    (SELECT balance FROM trans WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM client_account) AND date = '1998-12-27') AS bal_late
)
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN bal_early = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((bal_late - bal_early) * 100.0 / bal_early) END AS increase_rate
FROM balances;	----- bird -----	financial
